creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 166585
Proposed patch (since 400556 revision)

Patch to update dns/dnscrypt-proxy port from 1.6.0 to 1.6.1 version.

Look following link for changes:
https://github.com/jedisct1/dnscrypt-proxy/compare/1.6.0...1.6.1

- Update contents of PORTDOCS variable
- Update OpenDNS resolver name for files/dnscrypt-proxy_multi.in as in files/dnscrypt-proxy.in file
- Add upstream patch for src/proxy/edns.c file, committed after release on GitHub

This release includes security fixes, therefore author advises to "upgrade as soon as possible":
https://github.com/jedisct1/dnscrypt-proxy/commit/1d129f7d5f0d469308967cbe4eacb4a6919f1fa1
